## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run test:unit -- --run`

- [ ] `npm run build`

## Privacy, security, and data semantics

- [ ] No secrets, real publisher exports, session data, or personal information are included.
- [ ] Authorization remains enforced server-side.
- [ ] New external requests or stored data are documented.
- [ ] Metric labels and aggregation behavior match the underlying source.
